label: SendCutSend
policy_notes: Public instant-quote; sheet metal has no buyer API industry-wide. vcad-kernel-sheet encodes the SCS shop profile (published bend catalog), so uploads arrive pre-validated and should quote clean on the first try. STEP uploads auto-detect bends; DXF for flat parts. 6061 is not bendable at SCS — flat 6061 only. Recon 2026-07-07 (agentic probes): quote flow is the SPA route app.sendcutsend.com/customer#/quote and is fully usable WITHOUT an account (LOGIN link optional). Landing screen: 'Drop up to 10 files here' drop zone backed by ONE unnamed multi-file input[type=file] + a BROWSE FILES control; alternate paths on the same screen: AI Part Builder, template builder, custom-quote RFQ. Accepted uploads: .ai .dxf .dwg .eps .stp .step. RESOLVED (3rd probe, recorded): file delivery works via synthetic in-page upload — one Runtime.evaluate builds File from bytes, DataTransfer, sets input.files, dispatches change (bubbles:true); the Vue/Bulma SPA parses immediately and echoes the detected bounding box (fixture read as 100x50 mm). Post-upload flow: units-confirmation modal (INCH/MM, CONFIRM) -> material category -> family -> alloy -> thickness radio tiles (stable value codes, e.g. ALU-125) -> priced configurator (qty number input, $/ea, volume breaks, Subtotal, 'Arrives as soon as' date, ADD TO CART). Pricing fully anonymous.

units.note: units-confirmation modal; kerf intents are mm

material_family.note: per category; Metals: Aluminum, Brass, Copper, Stainless Steel, Steel, Titanium (recorded 2026-07-07)

material.note: alloy label; Aluminum: 2024 T3, 5052 H32, 6061 T6, 7075 T6, MIC-6 (recorded 2026-07-07)

thickness.note: STABLE radio value code, e.g. ALU-125 for .125" (3.2 MM); aluminum range ALU-040..ALU-500 (recorded 2026-07-07)

finish.note: post-configurator step (not yet recorded); coatings damp the ring — leave resonant parts raw.
